summary: Add keyboard shortcut (Cmd+K) to open the global search from any page — reduces friction for power users navigating between deals and contacts
Replace the static sidebar nav with a collapsible panel — saves 240px of horizontal space on tablet and keeps keyboard shortcuts visible. Affects /dashboard and all sub-pages.
Add a bulk action toolbar that appears when multiple deals are selected — lets users assign owner, change stage, or archive in one tap instead of editing each deal individually.
Add a 'Deals at Risk' smart filter to the pipeline view — surfaces deals with no activity in 7+ days, overdue tasks, or stalled stages so reps can prioritize follow-ups before deals go cold.
